reviews.review_description: Not bad, it has some good pics and UI is ok, but it needs some improvements. For example, why not add captions to the pics so that we can know what we are watching? OTOH, transitions between pictures should be seamless, not showing you the cosmic background in between. And those spaces where you get a collection of 2D images should be distinguishable from the 360° pics before you enter them. And you should be able to zoom into the 2D pics. Hope they'll do all this and it will be an app worth to keep in the library. Saludos!
